skills.description: Validates duration of physical therapy, NSAIDs, and activity modification.
skills.logic: Check if physical therapy >= 6 weeks AND NSAID/activity modification are documented.

skills.description: Validates mechanical symptoms, MRI findings, and age-related criteria.
skills.logic: Verify (mechanical_symptoms == true) AND (mri_meniscal_tear == true) AND (age < 65 OR (age >= 65 AND is_degenerative == false)).

skills.description: Validates if the scan meets staging, restaging, or recurrence criteria.
Validates if the requesting physician is an oncologist, pulmonologist, or surgeon.
Validates diagnosis severity scores, patient age, and provider specialty.
skills.logic: (IGA >= 3 OR EASI >= 16 OR BSA >= 10) AND Age >= 6 AND (Specialty == 'Dermatologist' OR Specialty == 'Allergist/Immunologist')

skills.description: Validates failure or contraindication of topical, calcineurin, and systemic treatments.
skills.logic: TopicalSteroid >= 4 weeks AND CalcineurinInhibitor >= 4 weeks AND SystemicImmunosuppressant >= 3 months
